## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My commits are **signed off** for the DCO (`git commit -s` adds a `Signed-off-by` line — see [DCO](../DCO)).
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …).
- [ ] This PR **does not add, modify, or extend the torrent/magnet metadata-search subsystem** (`go-api/internal/torrents/`, `TorrentModal*`) — that area is out of scope for external contributions (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`go test ./...`, `bun test`, and/or Jest) and I added/updated tests where it makes sense.
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant.
